NAME: H3Africa
NOTE: NIH & Wellcome–funded consortium of studies and biobanks across Africa.
DESCRIPTION: Human Heredity and Health in Africa: pan-African genomics and epidemiology initiative producing genome-wide data, reference panels, and phenotype-linked biosamples for disease and population-genetics GWAS.
MANUAL_CITATION: H3Africa Consortium (2025). H3Africa: a model for implementing biobank-based genomic research in resource-constrained settings. Human Molecular Genetics. PMID: 40618283.
